Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4000 "YOGISGREATESCAPE-8600-4000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $8600 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Yogi's Great Escape.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $8600 which sets the correct VICII settings to allow the game to display correctly.
